circular_title: CBDT Circular: TDS Rate Revision - FY 2026-27
circular_summary: TDS rates revised for Section 194C and 194J effective April 2026.
actions: Note for awareness — no immediate action required for Kapoor Tech Solutions Pvt. Ltd.
email_subject: Compliance Advisory: CBDT Circular: TDS Rate Revision - FY 2026-27
email_body:
{
  "subject": "CBDT Circular: TDS Rate Revision - FY 2026-27",
  "body": "Dear Neha Kapoor,

We are writing to inform you about the recent CBDT Circular regarding TDS rate revision for FY 2026-27, which applies to Kapoor Tech Solutions Pvt. Ltd. as it is an IT and software export company that may have tax deductions at source. This circular is relevant to your company as it may impact your tax compliance and withholding obligations.

The required actions for your company are:
1. Note this circular for awareness, as no immediate action is required for Kapoor Tech Solutions Pvt. Ltd.

There is no specific deadline for this circular, and the risk level is considered LOW. As the risk level is LOW, there is no penalty specified for non-compliance at this time.

If you have any questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to reach out to us. We are here to assist you with any compliance matters.

Best regards,
Compliance Advisory Team"
}
internal_notes: No specific compliance obligations identified for this client based on the provided circular, as TDS is not applicable to Kapoor Tech Solutions Pvt. Ltd.
